seasonContext: We are in SS26, week 10 of 26, with approximately 3.6 months left in the selling season. Sales typically ramp up significantly from March to June.

briefing.morningGreeting: Sales are steady, but we need to focus on optimizing inventory and brand performance.
briefing.healthContext: Revenue is solid, but blended sell-through at 25% indicates we have room for improvement in moving inventory.

salesAnalytics.revenueInsight: Total revenue is $213,323, showing a healthy trend, but we need to boost sell-through rates to improve cash flow.
salesAnalytics.brandInsight: Top performers include DAZE and Z SUPPLY with sell-through rates of 31% and 34%, respectively. Focus on reordering these brands.
salesAnalytics.channelInsight: POS sales are significantly higher at $25,576 compared to online at $6,856, indicating a need to enhance online marketing.

sellThrough.overallInsight: The overall sell-through rate is 25%, which is below target; we need to prioritize fast-moving items.
sellThrough.topPerformers: Reorder DAZE's Pleaser High Rise Ankle Jean and Z SUPPLY styles due to their strong sell-through rates.
sellThrough.slowMovers: Slow movers include ICHI's Dahlia Skinny Brown Belt and Z SUPPLY's Scout Cotton Jersey Pant; consider discounting or bundling these items.
sellThrough.brandRecommendations: Grow DAZE and Z SUPPLY due to their strong performance, maintain ICHI and RD STYLE, and reduce orders for slower brands like GLAMOROUS.

inventoryHealth.agingInsight: Inventory at cost is $342,406, indicating potential dead stock; we need to assess items with low sell-through.
inventoryHealth.categoryWOS: The Dress category has a high WOS at 62.0; consider promotions to clear this stock.
inventoryHealth.sizeGaps: Address size gaps by increasing stock for size M, which is under-bought, and reducing stock for sizes XL and XXL, which are over-bought.

buyPlanning.otbContext: We are slightly overbought overall, particularly in slower-moving categories.
buyPlanning.seasonalComparison: SS26 is tracking with more brands than SS25, but we need to ensure we are not overstocked on underperforming items.
buyPlanning.actionItems: 1. Reorder fast-selling items from DAZE and Z SUPPLY. 2. Run promotions on slow movers to clear inventory. 3. Adjust size orders to better match customer demand.

customers.vipInsight: Top customers are placing multiple orders, indicating strong retention; consider a loyalty program to enhance this.
customers.segmentInsight: Customer mix shows a healthy engagement, but we should analyze online customer behavior to improve sales in that channel.

metricsSummary: Season context: SS26 week 10 of 26. Roughly 3.6 months remain in the selling season. Overall: revenue $213,323, gross margin 46%, blended sell-through 25%, inventory at cost $342,406, inventory at retail $862,975, annualized turns 1.8x. Top 10 brands by revenue: ICHI ($57,012, ST 24%, GM 63%, sold 1,025, stock 3,159); DAZE ($29,333, ST 31%, GM 56%, sold 204, stock 464); Z SUPPLY ($26,480, ST 34%, GM 56%, sold 273, stock 525); B YOUNG ($22,082, ST 21%, GM 63%, sold 481, stock 1,853); RD STYLE ($22,076, ST 26%, GM 62%, sold 349, stock 987); PILGRIM ($15,391, ST 24%, GM 59%, sold 335, stock 1,051); SAINT TROPEZ ($10,829, ST 18%, GM 60%, sold 156, stock 695); DEX ($7,653, ST 27%, GM 61%, sold 114, stock 303); DELUC ($6,684, ST 26%, GM 57%, sold 96, stock 279); SADIE AND SAGE ($3,931, ST 20%, GM 57%, sold 67, stock 273). Bottom 5 brands by sell-through: GLAMOROUS (9%, $80, stock 43); GENTLE FAWN (10%, $20, stock 9); CAMILLE (11%, $33, stock 8); SECOND SKIN (15%, $2,277, stock 370); BRUNETTE (15%, $631, stock 33). Categories: TOP (ST 21%, WOS 39.0, stock 3,798, revenue $46,737); DENIM (ST 28%, WOS 26.0, stock 731, revenue $34,210); SWEATER (ST 37%, WOS 17.0, stock 875, revenue $30,842); PANT (ST 23%, WOS 33.0, stock 1,007, revenue $22,241); JACKET (ST 39%, WOS 15.0, stock 270, revenue $20,420); JEWELRY (ST 23%, WOS 33.0, stock 949, revenue $13,766); CARDIGAN (ST 28%, WOS 25.0, stock 440, revenue $11,672); BLAZER (ST 19%, WOS 43.0, stock 258, revenue $5,806); DRESS (ST 14%, WOS 62.0, stock 579, revenue $5,571); ACCESSORIES (ST 18%, WOS 46.0, stock 640, revenue $4,599); VEST (ST 47%, WOS 11.0, stock 72, revenue $2,776); SKIRT (ST 23%, WOS 33.0, stock 177, revenue $2,383). Reorder alerts count: 7. Reorder-now styles: ICHI — CORNSTALK JACKET (0.2/wk, 100%); ICHI — BLACK MESH BALLET FLAT (0.1/wk, 100%); B YOUNG — CHERRY OVERSIZED CREWNECK SWEATER (0.0/wk, 100%); RD STYLE — SAYLOR BLOUSE (CREAM) (0.1/wk, 100%); DAZE — PLEASER HIGH RISE ANKLE JEAN (BLACK) (0.4/wk, 83%); SADIE AND SAGE — CREAM WIDE LEG DENIM (0.0/wk, 100%); SAGE THE LABEL — NAVY STRETCH TOP (0.0/wk, 100%). Top sold-out styles by velocity: ICHI CORNSTALK JACKET (0.2/wk, 100%, 6.8 weeks); RD STYLE SAYLOR BLOUSE (CREAM) (0.1/wk, 100%, 29.4 weeks); ICHI BLACK MESH BALLET FLAT (0.1/wk, 100%, 47.6 weeks); SADIE AND SAGE CREAM WIDE LEG DENIM (0.0/wk, 100%, 51.9 weeks); SAGE THE LABEL NAVY STRETCH TOP (0.0/wk, 100%, 47.6 weeks). Size gaps under-bought: M (+4 pts; demand 25%, buy 21%). Size gaps over-bought: XXL (-4 pts; demand 1%, buy 5%); XL (-3 pts; demand 7%, buy 10%); XS (-2 pts; demand 15%, buy 17%). Store breakdown: Saint John: $96,197 revenue, 41%, 1,651 units, AOV $133; Moncton: $67,883 revenue, 50%, 992 units, AOV $160; Halifax: $49,243 revenue, 47%, 748 units, AOV $122. Best performers: RD STYLE — SOFT KNIT BROWN HALF ZIP (9 units, $711); PILGRIM — GIFT WITH PURCHASE (RED HEART - GOLD) (9 units, $0); RD STYLE — DARK GREY CREW NECK PULLOVER (8 units, $316); RD STYLE — VICTORIA BLACK PULL ON SWEATS (6 units, $474); ICHI — IVO GREY BEANIE (6 units, $117); ICHI — REFINED SQUARE NECK TOP (BLACK) (6 units, $147); ICHI — REFINED SQUARE NECK TOP (CHOCOLATE) (6 units, $157); ICHI — KATE OFFICE WIDE LEG TROUSER (BLK) (6 units, $579). Slow movers: ICHI — DAHLIA SKINNY BROWN BELT (1 units, $23, 0.1/wk); PILGRIM — JAMESON SILVER RING (1 units, $59, 0.1/wk); PILGRIM — SPARKLE GOLD NECKLACE SET (1 units, $69, 0.1/wk); ICHI — DASILA CARDIGAN (BLUE) (1 units, $69, 0.1/wk); B YOUNG — FUZZY CONTRAST SWEATER (1 units, $55, 0.1/wk); Z SUPPLY — SCOUT COTTON JERSEY PANT (GREEN) (1 units, $53, 0.1/wk); Z SUPPLY — ALL DAY KNIT JACKET (CHOCOLATE) (1 units, $101, 0.1/wk); LA — TIE FRONT KNIT CARDI (CREAM) (1 units, $48, 0.1/wk). Customers: total 6,904, with orders 2,024, total spent $606,987.
